# Journex Ai

> AI-powered trading journal and coach for crypto, forex, and futures traders. Log trades, detect emotional patterns, and improve performance with personalized AI insights.

Journex Ai turns trade history into actionable coaching: pattern detection across thousands of trades, emotional-trigger analysis, session performance metrics, and an AI Mistake Finder that surfaces what silently destroys profits.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Product overview, features, pricing, and AI insights demo.
- [About](/about): Mission, why traders fail, how AI helps, and product vision.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on trading psychology, risk management, and performance optimization.
- [Contact](/contact): Support, partnerships, and frequently asked questions.
- [Demo Dashboard](/demo): Fully functional dashboard with sample data — no signup required.
- [Affiliate Program](/affiliate): Earn commissions by referring traders to Journex Ai.

## Optional
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How user trading data is stored and protected.
- [Sign Up](/signup): Create an account to start journaling trades.
- [Log In](/login): Sign in to the trading dashboard.
